name: VANJIA CORP
business: Vanjia Corporation aims to build affordable housing in the city of Houston's designated HOPE and Workforce neighborhoods. The company has acquired a vacant lot in the Workforce neighborhoods. Future homes will be available for down payment assistance to potential clients who meet specific criteria outlined by the HHCD.
sellsTo: Low-to-moderate income homebuyers in Houston HOPE and Workforce neighborhoods
Section 8 tenants eligible for homeownership vouchers

exposures.sentence: Our aim is to build affordable housing in the city of Houston's designated HOPE and Workforce neighborhoods.
